results.title: Pooja Hegde shares glimpses with co-star Vijay from the sets 'Jana Nayagan'
results.description: Pooja Hegde opened up about her happiness by sharing pictures from the sets of 'Jana Nayagan' with co-star Vijay. 'Jana Nayagan' has hit the theatres on Thursday directed by H. Vinoth and starring Mamitha Baiju, Prakash Raj, Bobby Deol and others in pivotal role.

results.description: Discover how FCNR(B) deposits serve as a crucial tool for India's foreign currency resource mobilization amid global financial uncertainties.

results.title: Maddock Films Postpones ‘Prahaar’ Release Amid Box Office Clash
results.description: The much-anticipated film Prahaar, produced by Maddock Films and starring Rajkummar Rao, has been postponed from its original release date. This announcement follows the recent news regarding the delay of another Maddock production, Eetha, which was set to debut on August 28. The move highlights a significant change in the cinematic landscape for August. According [...] The post Maddock Films Postpones ‘Prahaar’ Release Amid Box Office Clash appeared first on The CSR Journal .

results.title: Five detained under Goondas Act in Coimbatore
results.description: COIMBATORE: Five of the nine people arrested for kidnapping, assaulting and attempting to extort Rs 2 lakh from a bakery owner have been detained unde.

results.title: Billionaire Adani Weighs Airline Launch In Indian Duopoly Market, Sources Say
results.description: The Adani Group is exploring plans to enter India’s airline sector by launching a new carrier or acquiring a stake in an existing airline, according to sources. The move could increase competition in a market dominated by IndiGo and Air India. The group, which operates eight airports, has not taken a final decision yet.
